hero.subtitleLine1: F1 teams don't win with just fast cars; they win with real-time telemetry.
hero.subtitleLine2: Leanmote is the GraphRAG-powered system that maps your team's DNA to
hero.subtitleEmphasis: unblock workflows, optimize AI ROI, and reach 15% Q-on-Q acceleration.

subscribeCta.heading: Ready to see your team clearly?
subscribeCta.desc: Subscribe for exclusive updates and be the first to try Leanmote.
subscribeCta.finePrint: We respect your privacy. Unsubscribe at any time.

f1Engine.subtitle: Most engineering leaders are trapped in project-level firefighting. Elite teams manage the system itself.

items.title: The Meeting Trap
items.description: CTOs spend hours in "status update" loops trying to find bottlenecks manually.

items.title: 7-Day Root Cause Search
items.description: By the time you find the blocker, the sprint is already derailed.

items.title: AI Investment Blindness
items.description: Buying Copilot seats without knowing if they actually speed up delivery.

items.title: Instant Bottleneck ID
items.description: Leanmote identifies the exact blocker in seconds, not hours.

items.title: GraphRAG Context
items.description: Understand the full dependency chain. Fix the system, not just the symptom.

items.title: Agentic Resolution
items.description: Autonomous re-routing of work to clear gridlocks without human intervention.

sprintTrack.title1: The Bottleneck Cycle vs. F1 Precision
sprintTrack.title2: Your sprint as an F1 race.
sprintTrack.subtitle: Agentic orchestration from Day 1 to Day 7 — delivery, telemetry, oversight.

without.title: The Bottleneck Cycle
without.subtitle: Manual syncs. Invisible friction. Telemetry arrives after the damage is done.

with.title: F1 Precision
with.subtitle: Agentic orchestration end-to-end. Live telemetry. The pit wall is in.

security.desc1: We built Leanmote with a "Security First" architecture. We process metadata, never source code.
security.desc2: No workflow changes required. We integrate with GitHub, GitLab, Jira, Linear, Slack, PagerDuty, and 50+ other tools to extract insights instantly.

cards.title: SOC2 Type II Certified
cards.description: Independently audited security controls. We hold data the way your audit team needs.

cards.title: Read-Only Access
cards.description: We pull metadata we need. We never write to your repos or tooling.

cards.title: Zero-Retention Policy
cards.description: Your source code is processed, never stored. Only the insights leave the tunnel.

knowledgeGraph.subtitle: Standard tools see tickets; we see the Telemetry. Our Knowledge Graph identifies why Olivia is blocked across 3 projects or why an API endpoint is causing 14h of drag—and then gives you the 'Resolve' button.

features.title: Cross-Repo Dependency Mapping
features.desc: Visualize how changes in one service impact others instantly.

features.title: AI Agent Collaboration
features.desc: Track how Cursor and Copilot are actually impacting code velocity.

features.title: Human-in-the-Loop Telemetry
features.desc: Identify burnout risk and knowledge silos before they break the team.

roiCalculator.subtitle: Calculate your potential annual savings and return on investment.
roiCalculator.volumeTooltipBody: Merged Pull Requests + Closed Tasks. This measures your team's actual output velocity.
roiCalculator.costTooltipBody: Supports global team benchmarks, including LatAm tech hubs (starting at $30k) and US-standard rates. The hourly rate is derived as Annual Cost ÷ 2,080 working hours.
roiCalculator.outputTooltipBody: The sum of avoided management investigation hours and the engineering throughput dividend generated by GraphRAG unblocking.
roiCalculator.totalNote: Total Annual Efficiency Reclaimed across management time savings and engineering throughput dividend.
roiCalculator.velocityText: By shifting from seat-based tax to unit-based outcome, your effective cost-per-work-item is projected at
roiCalculator.leadSub: We'll generate a detailed analysis based on your team's specific metrics.

benchmarks.title: Cost per impact unit by
benchmarks.note: Our GraphRAG engine is engineered to drive your cost-per-unit down as your system matures.

rows.characteristics: Mature GraphRAG integration, automated workflows, <2h cycle times
Active optimization, partial automation, 4-8h cycle times
Manual processes, reactive management, 24h+ cycle times
